name: Architecture Review
description: Review code architecture and design decisions
prompt:
Review code architecture:

1. Identify architectural patterns (MVC, MVVM, Clean, etc.)
2. Evaluate separation of concerns
3. Check dependency direction (dependency inversion)
4. Analyze module boundaries
5. Review layer interactions
6. Identify coupling and cohesion issues
7. Suggest architectural improvements

Provide architecture diagram recommendations and refactoring paths.
